summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Neon Connect Dots & Boxes game. All core features working correctly. Fixed minor deprecation warnings. App is production-ready.
updated_files: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx - Fixed textShadow deprecation warning (removed textShadow property)
/app/frontend/app/index.tsx - Fixed pointerEvents deprecation warning (moved to StyleSheet)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - offline game with no database
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Minor deprecation warnings were fixed. No further testing needed unless new features are added.

tests: ✓ NEON CONNECT title displays correctly with neon cyan accent
✓ LOCAL MULTIPLAYER button visible and functional
✓ VS COMPUTER button visible and functional
✓ SETTINGS button visible and functional
✓ Grid size indicator shows current selection (e.g., Grid: 5×5)
✓ Difficulty selection appears when VS COMPUTER clicked
✓ Easy/Medium/Hard difficulty buttons all functional
✓ Smooth entrance animations working
✓ Game board renders correctly for 3×3, 5×5, and 7×7 grids
✓ Dots render in correct positions (tested 3×3=9 dots, 5×5=25 dots, 7×7=49 dots)
✓ Horizontal and vertical lines are interactive with correct testIDs
✓ Lines draw with correct player colors (cyan #00F0FF for P1, magenta #FF0055 for P2)
✓ Line drawing animations smooth and responsive
✓ Turn alternates correctly between Player 1 and Player 2
✓ Box completion works - fills with player color and number
✓ Extra turn awarded when completing a box
✓ Score panel updates correctly when boxes are captured
✓ Turn indicator shows current player name with color
✓ Active player indicator (underline bar) displays correctly
✓ Box counter updates (e.g., 1/16 boxes, 0/36 boxes)
✓ Header shows 'LOCAL MATCH' with box count
✓ Back button returns to home screen
✓ AI game starts with correct difficulty (EASY/MEDIUM/HARD)
✓ Header shows 'VS AI · [DIFFICULTY]'
✓ Player names show 'YOU' and 'AI BOT'
✓ AI thinking indicator appears ('AI is thinking...' with chip icon)
✓ AI makes moves automatically after delay (500-1000ms)
✓ AI moves are drawn in magenta (Player 2 color)
✓ Human player can draw lines when it's their turn
✓ Game prevents human moves during AI's turn
✓ All three difficulty levels start correctly
✓ Settings screen accessible from home
✓ Back button returns to home
✓ Grid size section displays all options (3×3 to 7×7)
✓ Grid size buttons are interactive and update selection
✓ Active grid size highlighted with cyan border and background
✓ Grid size change persists and shows on home screen
✓ Sound & Haptics toggle present and functional
✓ Sound toggle updates visual state
✓ How to Play section displays game rules
✓ Box count calculation shown (e.g., 5×5 grid · 16 boxes)
✓ Game over screen appears after all lines drawn (2 second delay)
✓ Trophy emoji (🏆) shows for winner
✓ Handshake emoji (🤝) shows for tie
✓ Winner announcement displays correctly (PLAYER 1 WINS! / PLAYER 2 WINS! / IT'S A TIE!)
✓ Winner text color matches winning player color
✓ Final scores displayed in score card
✓ PLAY AGAIN button starts new game with same settings
✓ MAIN MENU button returns to home screen
✓ Background glow effect with winner color
✓ Smooth entrance animations for all elements
✓ Line drawing animations scale in smoothly
✓ Box fill animations with scale and opacity
✓ Score updates with bounce animation
✓ Button press animations (scale down on press)
✓ Staggered entrance animations on home screen
✓ Turn indicator animations
✓ AI thinking dots pulse animation

observations: ✓ Dark mode (#05050A background) with neon accents looks excellent
✓ Touch targets adequate - buttons are large enough (>44px)
✓ Text contrast excellent - white text on dark background
✓ Mobile viewport (375×667) tested - all elements fit properly
✓ Game board scales appropriately for different screen sizes
✓ Typography clear and readable (proper font sizes)
✓ Border radius consistent (rounded corners on buttons and cards)

bugs_fixed.fix: Removed textShadow property from titleAccent style (React Native Web doesn't support textShadow in style objects)
Moved pointerEvents from inline prop to StyleSheet definition

performance_notes: Animations are smooth with no lag
No memory leaks observed during testing
console_warnings: AudioContext errors (non-breaking, expected in headless browser testing)
